applied_optimizations.name: ROCm-compatible Triton kernel
applied_optimizations.description: Fixed Triton kernel for ROCm: replaced tl.libdevice.tanh with manual implementation using tl.math.exp, added explicit .to(tl.float32) casts on load and store, used BLOCK_SIZE as next_power_of_2 capped at 8192

notes: Successfully fixed ROCm Triton kernel by replacing tl.libdevice.tanh with manual tanh using tl.math.exp
BLOCK_SIZE set to triton.next_power_of_2(n_cols) capped at 8192 for wavefront alignment
Final benchmark verified: RUNTIME_MS: 0.954, REF_RUNTIME_MS: 0.999, SPEEDUP: 1.047, SCORE: 60.5
